title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Rhenus Logistics India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Rhenus Logistics India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Rhenus Logistics India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Distribution Manager at our Kolkata location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Rhenus Logistics India:
Rhenus Logistics India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in Fleet Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Rhenus Logistics India!
